title: Ex-Ditector CT-Log Exposure Self-Check Input
description: Enumerates the hostnames a domain you OWN has published to PUBLIC Certificate Transparency logs (RFC 6962, via crt.sh), and grades the exposure. Prohibited scopes are intentionally absent from the enum; only self/public_figure are accepted because CT subdomain enumeration is a dual-use technique permitted only for a domain you own or a public figure's public domain.

scope_type.title: Scope type
scope_type.description: This CT enumeration is permitted ONLY for your own domain (self) or a genuine public figure's public domain (public_figure). Other compliant scopes (consented/brand/safety_evidence) intentionally cannot run this actor.

domain.title: Domain to audit
domain.description: The registrable domain you OWN, e.g. "example.com". Only PUBLIC Certificate Transparency log data (issued-cert hostnames) is read. A pasted URL, user@domain, or *.domain is tolerated and normalized to the base domain.

ct_index_url.title: CT index base URL
ct_index_url.description: Public Certificate Transparency index endpoint that returns JSON for ?identity=%.<domain>&output=json. Defaults to crt.sh. Must be https://.

subject_label.title: Subject label
subject_label.description: Human label for the subject (e.g. your name or org). Used only for reporting; scanned by the compliance gate for prohibited intent.
